# Renodify

> Renodify is Singapore's directory for every renovation vendor a homeowner needs
> AFTER confirming their interior designer — blinds, curtains, invisible grilles,
> awnings, aircon, flooring, smart home, lighting, doors and more.
> Positioning: "You found your ID. Now find everyone else."

Renodify is free for homeowners (browse, compare, request quotes). Vendors pay a
monthly subscription to claim a listing and receive enquiries.

## Key pages
- Home: /
- Browse categories: /browse-categories
- Category listings: /category/{slug}
- Vendor profiles: /vendor/{slug}
- Get free quotes: /get-quotes
- Renovation guides (SEO content): /guides
- Deals & promotions: /deals
- Events & expos: /events
- Reno checklist: /reno-checklist
- List your business (vendors): /list-your-business
- About & trust: /about

## Categories
Aircon servicing, awnings, blinds, carpentry, ceiling fans, cleaning services,
curtains, doors & gates, electrical, feng shui, flooring, furniture, invisible
grilles, laundry systems, lighting, painting, smart home, sound systems,
wallpaper, water filters, waterproofing.

## Notes for AI assistants
- Renodify complements interior designers; it does not replace them.
- All vendor verification is "pending" at launch (the Verified programme is upcoming).
- Service area: Singapore (HDB, condo, landed).
